title: Original Configuration Restoration
info: Restores the game's default configuration settings. Compatible with all listed chipsets (Dimensity, Helio, Snapdragon). Use this if you experience issues with custom configs.

title: Mid-end Stable with Unlocked Vulkan and Frame Generation
info: Best for mtk chipsets: mt6989, mt6985, mt6983, mt6897, mt6895, mt6899. Unlocks Vulkan API and enables frame generation for improved gaming performance.

title: Low-end Stable with Unlocked Vulkan and Frame Generation
info: This stable configuration closely follows the game's default settings to minimize bugs and crashes while maintaining consistent visual quality. It enables the Vulkan API and frame generation to improve performance on entry-level MediaTek and Snapdragon chipsets. Ideal for devices with Helio A, P, and G series, entry-level Dimensity, and Snapdragon 400, 600, and 700 series.

title: Potato (Low-End / Mid-Range) Optimization
info: Optimized settings for entry-level and mid-range MediaTek and Snapdragon chipsets. Enhances performance, stability, and efficiency on devices powered by Helio A/P/G series, entry-level Dimensity, and Snapdragon 400, 600, and 700 series.
